column1: Consent
column2: To what extent did you feel that there was clarity in your purpose for volunteering at Organization?
column3: To what extent do you think that having clear consequences for missing key deadlines is important for keeping contributors engaged?
column4: How much did seeing the founder, working hard inspire you to contribute to Organization?
column5: How much did seeing your team lead(s) working hard inspire you to contribute to Organization?
column6: How did personalized thank-you messages from the founder and team leads affect your commitment to Organization? [Not at all]
column7: How much did Organization provide opportunities for you to grow as a professional?
column8: How much did opportunities for career advancement (e.g. mentorship, networking) affect your engagement with Organization? [Not at all]
column9: How much did having a respected job title impact your sense of value at Organization?
column10: Considering your overall experience with Organization, how motivated do you feel to contribute to similar organizations or projects in the future?
